title: Top Heroes: Kingdom Saga
notes: New Guild PVP mode "Fortress Siege" launches Beta on July 4! Cross-server faction battles await. Plus: improved battle reports and Island Trials map.

title: Zenless Zone Zero
notes:

title: Cat Hero : Idle RPG
notes:
A [Dismantle All] feature for Cat Souls will be added.

A confirmation pop-up will appear when summoning Cannons, Skills, or Companions using Gems.

'Chosen Legendary/Mythic Pickup Summon' Event will run for 1 week.

The 'Revival Pack' Event, allowing the purchase of expired Limited Packs, will run for 1 week.

The minigame 'Skewer Cat' will run for 2 weeks.

title: Rise of Kingdoms
notes:
Greetings Governor,
We plan to update the game to version 1.1.08: Starlit Blaze on 【UTC 2026/6/3 06:00】. The servers will be down for an estimated 【3 hours】 during the update. We apologize for any inconvenience this might cause and will send you a reward as compensation once the update is complete.

=Summer Solstice Event Series=
Firefly lantern bright, light up the midsummer night. The Summer Solstice event series is coming soon, and we have prepared exciting content for you to enjoy:

title: Pikmin Bloom
notes:
Thanks for playing Pikmin Bloom! New in this version:

- Adjusted the sorting order of mushrooms in the Expeditions Tab. Mushroom battles you've been invited to will continue to be prioritized. If you still have free mushroom battle tries remaining for the day, mushrooms with four or fewer participants will now be shown next.
- Minor improvements and bug fixes.

*Please download the latest version of the app from the store for the changes above to be reflected.

title: Legend of Avatar
notes:
- Added Equipment Tempering system.
- Added Eternity I grade Equipment.
- Added VIP system.
- Improvements.
- Bug fixes.

title: Haunted Merge: Horror Story
notes: - Fixed some known issues

title: Bingo Voyage: Live Bingo Games
notes:
Thank you for being part of our amazing community! We are dedicated to bringing you the #1 gaming experience, and this update is no exception.

Update now to enjoy: 
• Fresh in-game events and rewards
• A smoother, bug-free experience
• Exciting new improvements and surprises

title: Once Human
notes:
1. Grand [Dreamy Maelstrom] Celebration: sign-in, lottery & gifts for new/returning players
2. First-person perspective in both Once Human and RaidZone, free view switching
3. New Roguelike Dreamy Rift with server-wide leaderboard
4. RaidZone event with limited Blood Moon mode Lunar Revelry
5. Three new Deviants: crimson ZapCam, Mr. Wish & rideable Behemoth
6. New monsters: Acting Physician & Lady Sea Nettle
7. New weapons QBJ97 & M700, armor & Ghost Link Set
8. New dye, Music Player & Radiance

title: Mystery Town: Merge Games
notes: More exciting events will be launched one after another, stay tuned！

title: Eternal Sword Pact
notes:
1.Visual & Engine Optimizations: Further optimized character textures and environment rendering for a smoother visual experience. 
2.UI Polish: Refined the visual presentation of selected in-game menus and item icons. 
3.Performance Enhancements: Addressed minor graphical glitches and improved overall client stability.

title: Rogue Legend - Roguelike RPG
notes:
What's New
* Bug Fixes — We squashed a batch of pesky bugs for a smoother, steadier run.
* Improvements — Quality-of-life polish across the board.
Roll the dice and dive back in!
